turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Ok. I have a friend who I've known a long time, who is one of my closest friends, but who is extremely insecure. She constantly seeks affirmation that I love and care for her, even though she should KNOW I do, since we have been friends for so long.

results.term: It's just been an ongoing thing that has escalated...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It's just been an ongoing thing that has escalated recently because she's so afraid and timid and doesn't believe anyone could really love or care for her. I get sick of having to say that of course I love her.

results.term: I have. I address it every time it comes up. She a...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have. I address it every time it comes up. She always sells herself short. Recently I suggested she could babysit my kids, she agreed, then almost immediately said it was ok if I had someone better in mind, and didn't want her, even though I had asked her!

results.term: do you talk to your friend about it?

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: do you talk to your friend about it?

results.term: Yes, I know. Until she finds her self worth, it do...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes, I know. Until she finds her self worth, it doesn't matter what any of her friends say to her.

results.term: I have actually told her that. That it seems like ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have actually told her that. That it seems like she doesn't trust me.

results.term: It's frustrating to me and gives me anxiety becaus...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It's frustrating to me and gives me anxiety because I wish I could change her to see herself the way I, and others, do. But I know I can't make her see her self worth. That's something she has to find for herself.

results.term: That's good to hear about you and your friend.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That's good to hear about you and your friend.

results.term: I know they are. And yes, she's dealing with a lot...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I know they are. And yes, she's dealing with a lot, but we all are, and it would be so much better for her if she could trust the people who love her to actually love her.

results.term: Indeed. Thank you for your input.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Indeed. Thank you for your input.

results.term: Not really, because I'd just worry about her. She ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Not really, because I'd just worry about her. She needs someone like me to look after her. I'm kind of the Yin to her Yang. Thank you for your time and conversation!
